listings.description: This 1978 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 was repainted in green with black accents under previous ownership, and it was acquired by the seller on BaT in September 2021. listings.title: 2006 Mazda MX-5 Miata 5-Speed
listings.description: This 2006 Mazda MX-5 Miata is finished in Galaxy Gray Mica over tan leather and is powered by a 2.0-liter inline-four paired with a five-speed manual transmission. Features include a convertible soft top, 16" five-spoke alloy wheels, fog lights, a CD stereo, power windows, a wind deflector, and air conditioning.

listings.title: Modified 2001 Honda S2000
listings.description: This 2001 Honda S2000 was purchased by the seller in 2010, and its modifications include a J's Racing wide-body kit, 18" Rays wheels, Buddy Club coilovers, an AP2 six-speed gearbox, and aftermarket mirrors. listings.title: 1984 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ60
listings.description: This 1984 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ60 spent time in Colorado and Idaho, where it was acquired by the seller in 2025, and it now shows 131k miles. Finished in Beige over tan and brown upholstery, it is powered by a 4.2-liter 2F inline-six linked with a four-speed manual transmission and a two-speed transfer case.

listings.title: Vortec-Powered 1976 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 w/Matching Trailer
listings.description: This 1976 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40 was modified in 2014, including the installation of a 5.3L Vortec V8, a four-speed 4L60E automatic transmission, and an Orion twin-stick dual-range transfer case. The build also involved adding ARB front and rear air lockers, four-wheel disc brakes, a 4" suspension lift, a 40-gallon fuel cell, and steel bumpers.

listings.title: 50k-Kilometer 1993 Nissan Skyline GT-R V-Spec
listings.description: This 1993 Nissan Skyline GT-R is one of 1,396 V-Spec examples produced and was imported to the US in 2022, when it was purchased by the seller in Japan. listings.title: 30k-Mile 2004 Honda S2000

listings.title: 1972 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40

It is finished in green over black vinyl upholstery and is powered by a 3.9-liter inline-six linked with a three-speed manual transmission and a dual-range transfer case.

listings.title: 2000 Toyota Land Cruiser UZJ100
listings.description: This 2000 Toyota Land Cruiser was purchased by its current owner in 2024, and subsequent work involved replacing the alternator, radiator, and cooling-fan clutch as well as fitting 17" Method Race wheels, 35" tires, ADS piggyback shocks, White Knuckle rock sliders, Dissent Off-Road bumpers and skid plates, and more.

listings.title: 1999 Honda Integra Type R

It is powered by a 1.8-liter B18C inline-four paired with a five-speed manual transaxle and a helical limited-slip differential.

listings.title: 1974 Toyota Land Cruiser FJ40
